lesson.title: Lesson Plan
lesson.confirmRegeneratePhase: Recreate all steps in this phase? Current content will be replaced by AI.
lesson.activityIdeaPlaceholder: Describe the core idea of the activity you want to design, AI will generate a full plan
lesson.adjustDescription: Describe how you want to adjust this step
lesson.overflowWarn: Consider adjusting activity duration (current {{current}} min, exceeds limit by {{overflow}} min)
lesson.phaseDurationSuggestion: Keep activities in this phase within 15 minutes
lesson.noFavorites: No saved steps or favorite activities yet
lesson.favoriteTip: Use the step card menu to save favorites here.
lesson.languageGoalPlaceholder: Example: Listening input for key emotion words and the sentence pattern “Let’s help...”
lesson.flowEditorTip: Write in real classroom order: design the activity first, then add teacher language and cues.
lesson.activityContentPlaceholder: What will students see, do, and complete in this step?
lesson.actionCuePlaceholder: Example: Hold up the envelope mysteriously; pause for responses
lesson.resourcesPlaceholder: Separate with commas or line breaks, e.g., mission cards, image cards, timer

map.title: Course Map
map.regenQuestion: Tell us what you want to adjust.
map.regenPlaceholder:
Example:
Add a team competition game in the Execute phase to make the outcome more challenging.

Make the scenario more sci-fi, such as completing the mission on an alien planet.
map.editModalSubtitle: Uses the same information structure as course creation. Saving will regenerate the storyline, language toolkit, class journey, and growth experience.

lesson.title: Lesson Plan
lesson.confirmRegenerateAll: Recreate the full lesson plan? All phase steps will be replaced by AI-generated content.

ppt.title: Courseware Design
ppt.templateTitle: Choose a template, then auto-layout the lesson plan
ppt.templateDescription: No courseware has been generated yet. Choose a template and the system will turn the lesson steps into editable PPT slides.
ppt.confirmDeleteSlide: Delete this slide? This cannot be undone.

courseOverview.title: Course Overview
courseOverview.generateLessonFailed: Lesson plan generation failed, please retry
courseOverview.adjustmentsPlaceholder:
Describe what you want to adjust, e.g.:
- Change theme to ocean adventure
- Add more SEL goals
- Lower language difficulty

imageLib.title: Image Library
imageLib.subtitle: Manage AI-generated, course-synced, and manually uploaded images
imageLib.noResultsHint: Try adjusting keywords, source, or type.
imageLib.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? It will be removed from the library.
imageLib.taskPromptAi: Generate {{name}}, style suitable for classroom presentation and courseware canvas.
imageLib.promptFlashcard: Generate child-friendly English vocabulary flashcards, clear visuals, simple background, suitable for classroom display and printing.
imageLib.promptStory: Generate magical animal themed story illustration, playful line art, friendly characters, suitable for reading materials and classroom storytelling.
imageLib.promptPpt: Generate classroom background image suitable for PPT canvas, with whitespace for content, warm and bright.
imageLib.promptTheme: Generate magical animal world theme image, cartoon illustration style, warm tones, suitable for course covers and intros.
imageLib.insertSubtitle: Select the target course, then the module and position within it.
imageLib.helperCover: The image will replace the course map cover as the primary visual on the course detail page.
imageLib.descCover: Replace or add to course map cover candidates
imageLib.helperPpt: The image will be inserted as an image layer in the current PPT canvas, draggable, scalable, and adjustable.
imageLib.descPpt: Select phase and specific PPT page
imageLib.helperReading: The image will be inserted into the reading material page as an illustration, background, or visual cue.
imageLib.descReading: Select reading material page to insert image

assetPanel.fB1Note: Chinese or English, suitable for generating text-free backgrounds.
assetPanel.fB2Placeholder: e.g. Forest classroom, title: Animal Rescue Mission
assetPanel.fB2Note: AI will automatically do poster-style image-text layout.
assetPanel.fB3Placeholder: e.g. cat, dog, bird, rabbit, one word per line
assetPanel.fB3Note: Each word generates 1 flashcard with a consistent layout.
assetPanel.fB4Placeholder: e.g. Poppy finds a glowing seed in the garden
assetPanel.fB4Note: You can choose a text whitespace area for later layout.
assetPanel.fB5Placeholder: e.g. Animal Sports Day / Interstellar Concert
assetPanel.fB5Note: AI automatically fills in the atmosphere based on activity type.
assetPanel.fB6Note: Outputs a scene vocabulary map with annotations.
assetPanel.fB7Placeholder: e.g. Can you find the hidden star?
assetPanel.fB7Note: Suitable for puzzles, short dialogues, and classroom question illustrations.
assetPanel.fB8Placeholder: e.g. Simple present tense, third person singular
assetPanel.fB8Note: Default output is landscape PPT mind map.
assetPanel.fB9Placeholder: e.g. Poppy and friends search for the sound of spring
assetPanel.fB9Note: Enter frame-by-frame editor to generate 4 frames.
assetPanel.fB10Placeholder: e.g. Can I have...? / I want to...
assetPanel.fB10Note: Fixed 4-panel comic layout with automatic plot structure.
assetPanel.fB13Placeholder: e.g. Space classroom, learning planet vocabulary
assetPanel.fB13Note: Select multiple IP characters. Default generates separate transparent character layers then composites scene.
assetPanel.audioReadPlaceholder: e.g. Jump like a rabbit. Stretch like a cat.
assetPanel.audioDialoguePlaceholder: e.g. A: What can you see? B: I can see a lion.
assetPanel.audioLyricsPlaceholder: Leave empty for AI to auto-generate rhyming lyrics
assetPanel.courseDescFallback: Auto-generated from lesson plan. Continue editing content and assets.
assetPanel.iwMultiSelectHint: Multi-select, generates independent transparent character layers.
assetPanel.iwAiAutoFill: AI auto-generates the image based on activity type and title, no prompt needed
assetPanel.iwAiGenScene: AI generates scene image and auto-annotates word positions
assetPanel.iwAiAutoLayout: AI auto-layouts knowledge structure based on chart type
assetPanel.iwStoryPlot: Story Plot (optional, leave empty for AI)
assetPanel.iwAutoComicLayout: Fixed 4-panel layout, AI auto-arranges plot structure
assetPanel.iwTextContentPlaceholder: e.g., What can fly but has no wings? ——A dream!
assetPanel.iwKnowledgePlaceholder:
Simple Present: Subject + base verb
Present Continuous: Subject + am/is/are + V-ing
Usage: habitual actions
assetPanel.iwPhrasePlaceholder: e.g., Can I have...? / I want to...
assetPanel.iwPlotPlaceholder: e.g., Panel 1: Character discovers an ice cream shop...
assetPanel.iwSelectFromBelow: Select from below or search to add actions...
assetPanel.iwSearchPlaceholder: Search actions, or press Enter to add
assetPanel.iwInputVocabHint: Input vocabulary and press Enter to add...
assetPanel.iwDirectGenHint: You can generate directly, or enter fullscreen to fine-tune character positions.
assetPanel.iwBgNoRotate: Background does not support rotation and flipping, only regeneration and scaling.
assetPanel.iwStoryPlaceholder: Give your picture book a name...
assetPanel.iwStoryContentPlaceholder: Paste your story content, AI will auto-split into multi-page storyboard...
assetPanel.iwDoNotClose: Please do not close the panel, it will auto-jump when done
assetPanel.iwGenFailed: Image generation failed, please try again later
assetPanel.iwNotReady: Image not ready yet, cannot save to library
assetPanel.iwSaveFailed: Failed to save to image library

createCourse.title: New Course
createCourse.grammarsPlaceholder: e.g. I feel... because... / Can you...?
createCourse.taskNamePlaceholder: e.g. Forest Starlight Concert, Emotion Monster Soothing
createCourse.storyContextPlaceholder: Set up characters, scene, problem and key actions in 1-2 sentences.
createCourse.keyOutcomePlaceholder: e.g. Each group will create and perform a 30-second Emotion Weather Broadcast.
createCourse.specialRequirementsPlaceholder: e.g. Must use the picture book attached; avoid certain teaching aids.
createCourse.ideaFailedRetry: Idea generation failed, please try again later
createCourse.polishFailedRetry: Polish failed, please try again later
createCourse.completeRequired: Please complete the required fields in the current step
createCourse.step1Subtitle: Define the language toolkit and student profile for this lesson.
createCourse.step2Subtitle: Create a fun story and challenge that uses this toolkit.
createCourse.step3Subtitle: Choose one or more exploration styles that best immerse students.
createCourse.step4Subtitle: (Optional) Add your unique ideas and specific requirements.
createCourse.courseNamePlaceholder: Leave blank and AI will generate a course name
createCourse.grammarPlaceholder: e.g. I feel... because..., then press Enter
createCourse.aiHelperDesc: Get AI creative inspiration from scratch, or let AI polish your existing content.
createCourse.taskNamePlaceholder: Give your adventure a catchy name! (e.g., Forest Starlight Concert, Emotion Monster Soothing Mission)
createCourse.storyPlaceholder: Set up an interesting scene and challenge in a sentence or two. Follow [Role]-[Scene]-[Problem/Need]-[Key Action]. e.g., We are Campus Noise Investigators who found annoying sounds in the hallway during nap time. Our mission is to find these noises and creatively transform them.
createCourse.outcomeRequired: Please enter the final output or work
createCourse.outcomePlaceholder: Sketch the final product or presentation. e.g., Each group will create and perform a 30-second Emotion Weather Broadcast.
createCourse.pathRequired: Please select at least one experience path
createCourse.pathArtDesc: Internalize language through drawing, crafts, drama, and storytelling. Great for quiet creators.
createCourse.pathBodyDesc: Bind language to movement through games, sports, and sensory experiences. Great for active learners.
createCourse.pathMusicDesc: Acquire language naturally through songs, rhythm, instruments, and sound theater. Great for musical classrooms.
createCourse.requirementsPlaceholder: "I want to include a story about 'sharing'"; "Must use the picture book The Color Monster as input for a phase"; "Please avoid certain teaching aids"
createCourse.atmosphereLabel: Atmosphere Preference (optional, AI will auto-match if not selected)

square.copySuccess: Course copied! Added to your course list, you can start editing.
